name: vibe-sentinel
description: Sentinel for vibe-coding: enforce assumption verification, change-control scope, and Scope Guard lifecycle discipline before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Sentinel for vibe-coding: assumption gate, change-control contract, and Scope Guard plan before implementation.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Sentinel combines three cross-agent guardrails into one plugin. The assumption-killer skill makes agents identify, classify, and verify assumptions with repository evidence before editing code. The change-control-compiler skill compiles vague requests into enforceable contracts with scope, allowed/forbidden areas, verification commands, risk, stop conditions, and drift detection. The scope-guard skill enforces Scope -> Design -> Pseudocode -> Review -> Implement -> Update Docs with a deterministic plan artifact. One vibe-sentinel orchestrator routes implementation tasks through the required gates and runs the validators before the final response.
defaultPrompt: Run the vibe-sentinel guardrail workflow before implementation.
Initialize the assumption gate, change-control contract, and Scope Guard plan artifacts.
Verify high-risk assumptions with repository evidence.
Validate scope, approve pseudocode when required, run final checks, and run drift before the final response.
